cross_references: dream_insight:never_assert_state_without_observation — unit 34: Edit(success=false) on file-select.v2.tsx before reading current content confirms this insight applies to edit operations, not just data/UI claims; the file state was not observed before the edit attempt was made

dream_insight:context_reconstruction_hallucination_risk — unit 46: Read on use-sync-q.ts (success=false) is consistent with the insight that session-boundary state reconstruction introduces wrong-path assumptions; the agent reconstructed an incorrect path from prior context rather than deriving it from current filesystem state

dream_insight:assertion_without_observation_unifies_three_failure_modes — unit 8 optimistic_edit_without_read and unit 34 optimistic_edit_without_read both confirm the insight; claiming an edit can be made without reading current file content is an assertion without observation
